Class EventFormDialog

java.lang.Object
planner.view.EventFormDialog
public final class EventFormDialog extends Object
EventFormDialog is a reusable dialog component responsible for collecting event information from the user through a graphical form.

Design Principles:

  • Separation of Concerns: Centralizes all event form creation, user input collection, and date parsing logic in a single component. This prevents code duplication and keeps the MainFrame class focused on application workflow and user interaction.
  • MVC Architecture: This class belongs to the View layer and is responsible only for presenting and collecting data. Business rules and validation remain delegated to the Controller and Model layers.

Validation Behaviour:

  • The dialog remains open until the user provides valid input or cancels.
  • If validation fails, an error message is displayed and the form is shown again with all previously entered values preserved.
  • The title field is mandatory and cannot be empty.
  • The date/time field must follow the format "MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm".

Recurrence Behaviour:

  • When creating a new event, recurrence options are available.
  • The repetitions field is dynamically shown only when a recurrence type other than "No recurrence" is selected.
Version:
2.0
Author:
Gustavo Henrique Nogueira de Andrade Filho, Pedro Rocha Dantas, Leonardo Oliveira Eid

    static final record 
    EventFormDialog.EventFormData
    Immutable data transfer object (DTO) used to transport form values collected from the user interface.

    showCreateDialog(Component parent)
    Displays a dialog for creating a new event.
    static Optional<EventFormDialog.EventFormData>

    Displays a dialog for editing an existing event.

  • Method Details

    • showCreateDialog

      public static Optional<EventFormDialog.EventFormData> showCreateDialog(Component parent)
      Displays a dialog for creating a new event.

      This is a convenience method that calls showDialog(Component, Event, boolean) with existingEvent set to null and includeRecurrence set to true.

      Parameters:
      parent - The parent Component where the dialog will be displayed
      Returns:
      An Optional containing the collected EventFormDialog.EventFormData if the user successfully completes the form, or an empty Optional if the dialog is cancelled

    • showEditDialog

      public static Optional<EventFormDialog.EventFormData> showEditDialog(Component parent, Event existingEvent)
      Displays a dialog for editing an existing event.

      This is a convenience method that calls showDialog(Component, Event, boolean) with existingEvent set to the provided event and includeRecurrence set to false. The form fields are populated with the existing event's data.

      Parameters:
      parent - The parent Component where the dialog will be displayed
      existingEvent - The Event object to be edited
      Returns:
      An Optional containing the collected EventFormDialog.EventFormData if the user successfully completes the form, or an empty Optional if the dialog is cancelled
